title: Investissement Québec completes C$125M equity investment in Sherweb Inc.
content:
## Investissement Québec completes C$125M equity investment in Sherweb Inc.
On February 28, 2026, Investissement Québec (“IQ”) completed a C$125 million equity investment in Sherweb Inc. (“Sherweb”), a provider of cloud solutions to managed service providers.
IQ is a government-owned corporation that drives Québec’s economic growth by offering financing, equity investments, and advisory services to businesses while fostering innovation and global investment.
McCarthy Tétrault LLP advised IQ with a team led by Hadrien Montagne that included Isabelle Nazon, Francis Langlois, Vincent Leduc (Corporate), Eugen Miscoi (IP), Francis Racine, Loïc Turner (Labour and Employment), and Marie-Soleil Landry (Tax).
